titleStmt.title: SII 22.75: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 75. (A.R. No. 75 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. PAR. RĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḺA (I)—21st YEAR (A.D. 1034-35)

summary.p: The inscription is badly damaged. It begins with introduction Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara etc., and seems to record some provision made for burning two lamps in the temple including one in the shrine of Durgā, by the toll-collecting officers of Vāḷaiyūr on the north bank.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunila maṭantaiyum poṟceyappā vaiyum cirtaṉic celviyun=taṉ perun=teviyarāki Iṉpuṟu neṭu
tuyalūḻiyi liṭaituṟaināṭuntuṭarvaṉave lippaṭar va koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭak
(k)kamum porukaṭa liḻattaraicartam muṭiyumāṅkavaṉ teviya ro pakkal teṉṉavan vaitta cun=taramuṭiyu min=tiranāramum
teṇṭiṟal Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatu meṟipaṭaik keraḷa tāṭiya kulatanamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyu ceṅkatirmālai caṅ
velaittol peruṅkāval palapaḻan=tivum ceruviṟ ciṉavi kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ cān=timaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya
cempontiruttaku muṭiyum koṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭ ciṅkaṉaḷapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭiya liraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai
yilakkamum navanetikkulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavira cakkarakoṭṭamum maṇakkoṇamum ve
ñcilaivira pañcapaḷḷiyum pācaṭai paḻaṉa mācuṇitecamum vaṇkirtti yiṟ can=tiraṉ tolkulattin=tirarataṉai
viḷaiyamarkaḷattu kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulataṉa ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭa viṣaiyamum pūcurar cernal kocalai nāṭum
taṉmapālaṉai vaṇṭuṟaicolai taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇa
ṇakīrtti takkaṇalāṭamuṅ kovin=tacan=taṉ māvi
vaṅkāḷatecamu paṉṉaiyum panmalaiyūreyiṟṟoṉmalai
kattañcuvittaruḷi talaittakkolamum valviṉai laṅkāval neṟ
peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittalneṭuṅkaṭaluttaralāṭamum
kiṭāramum māpperutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecari paṉma
rāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājentracoḷadevarkku yāṇṭu2 1Āvatu vāṇa
koppāṭip peṇṇai vaṭakarai vāḷaiyūrt tiruttāṉtoṉṟi ma
hādevarkku Iṉnāṭu cuṅkamum poramum pāṭṭam
yvārkaḷe vaitta tirunantāviḷakkoṉṟukku Eṇṇai yā
Uḻakkum Ikkoyilil tukkaiyārkku cantiviḷakku 1- kku Eṇṇai
Araippiṭiyum cantirātittavarai Aṭṭuvā naṭi Eṉ
talaimelaṉa Itu Iṟakkuvāṉ Eḻā narakattu kiḻānaraka
m pukuvāṉ Itu panmāyeśva[ rarakṣai *.]
Digital edition of SII 22.75 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
